title: The role of social norms on preferences towards climate change policies: A meta-analysis

excluded_policy_mentions.exact_term_used_in_paper: climate change mitigation and adaptation policies; climate change policies; climate control policies
excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Meta-analysis aggregates WTP for diverse climate programmes (green energy, disaster prevention, ecosystem protection) without distinguishing carbon or fuel tax instruments.

inclusion_reason: Focuses on WTP for various mitigation and adaptation programmes (green energy, disaster prevention, ecosystem-based programs), not on specific carbon or fuel tax instruments.
exclusion_reason: Meta-analysis does not isolate or analyze public support for carbon/CO2/fuel taxes; ‘tax’ only appears as a generic payment vehicle, not as a defined carbon-tax policy.
